title: Savory Crunchy Dutch King Prawn Crumble
description: A savory and chewy dutch dish featuring raw king prawns, lightly cured for added flavor and a touch of sweetness from honey.

ingredients.name: 1 cup raw king prawns
ingredients.notes: ensure they are fresh and undercooked, about to be cured

ingredients.name: ½ tsp black pepper
ingredients.notes: for a slight tangy flavor and to balance the sweetness from honey

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp nutritional yeast
ingredients.notes: to enhance savory flavors without dairy, optional for added depth

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp lemon juice (optional)
ingredients.notes: for a zingy touch of acidity

ingredients.name: 3 tbsp plant-based butter
ingredients.notes: ensure it is vegan and non-hydrogenated, such as coconut or almond oil

instructions: Place the raw king prawns in a bowl, add honey, salt, minced garlic, black pepper, nutritional yeast (if using), lemon juice (if using) and plant-based butter. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap or a lid for 15-20 minutes to allow flavors to meld together. The curing process will take care of any raw taste and enhance natural sweetness from the prawns.
Divide the mixture into small mounds, about 1-inch in diameter, on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 8-10 minutes until crispy and golden brown. You can turn the mixture over once during baking to ensure even browning.
Once done, allow the crumble to cool slightly before serving as a snack or appetizer.
